verdict.rationale: Using the current authoritative (v2, restated 15 Jul 2026) Q2 2026 net revenue of EUR 21.895M divided by period-end FTE of 224 gives 21,895,000 / 224 = 97,745.54, matching the claim exactly within the 0.2% tolerance; the lower v1 figure (21.712M) is explicitly marked PRELIMINARY and superseded by v2, so it is outdated and does not compete.

evidence.span_text: PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
